name: EOA – RSVP Intake & Qualification
description: Main intake workflow triggered by the Next.js /api/rsvp webhook. Scores incoming leads, auto-approves qualified ones, updates Supabase contact status, triggers the welcome sequence, and sends WhatsApp invites with niche-matched subgroup links.

nodes.name: RSVP Webhook
nodes.notes: This URL is set as N8N_WEBHOOK_URL in Next.js. Receives: name, email, whatsapp, businessNiche, website, socials, source, submittedAt.

nodes.name: Google Sheets – Set Contact Approved
nodes.notes: Updates the Contacts sheet row matching the submitted email. Credential must be set up in N8N: Credentials → Google Sheets OAuth2 API, named 'EOA Google Sheets'.

nodes.name: Trigger Welcome Email Sequence
nodes.notes: Fires the email drip sequence. N8N_WELCOME_SEQUENCE_URL = webhook URL of eoa-welcome-sequence workflow.

nodes.name: Loop – Subgroup WhatsApp Invites
nodes.notes: Iterates over matchedSubgroups. Each batch sends one subgroup invite.

parameters.subject: =[EOA] Manual review needed: {{$json.name}} (score {{$json.qualificationScore}}/3)
parameters.message:
=

New RSVP – Manual Review Required

A new RSVP came in with a qualification score below the auto-approve threshold.

Name{{$json.name}}
Email{{$json.email}}
WhatsApp{{$json.whatsapp}}
Business Niche{{$json.businessNiche}}
Website{{$json.website || 'Not provided'}}
Socials{{$json.socials || 'Not provided'}}
Score{{$json.qualificationScore}}/3
Submitted{{$json.submittedAt}}

To approve, go to the EOA admin panel and set this contact to 'approved', then manually trigger the welcome sequence.

notes: Primary RSVP intake workflow. Set webhook path to 'eoa-rsvp' (this URL is N8N_RSVP_WEBHOOK_URL in Next.js). Google Sheets CRM is the single source of truth — no Supabase. Requires: (1) SMTP credential 'EOA SMTP' in N8N, (2) Google Sheets OAuth2 credential 'EOA Google Sheets' in N8N (authorize via Google OAuth consent screen with sheets scope), (3) GOOGLE_SPREADSHEET_ID env var set to the EOA master spreadsheet ID.
